description: You are an Aviation Technical Writer. Format the winter operations engineering directive at /home/ga/Documents/b737_winter_ops_bulletin.odt, which is currently a raw text dump, according to the Flight Crew Operations Manual (FCOM) style guide at /home/ga/Desktop/fcom_style_guide.txt. Apply the required alignments, margins, font styles, tables, and lists as specified in the guide. Save the completed document to /home/ga/Documents/b737_winter_ops_bulletin.odt.

warnings: WARNING: Do not use engine anti-ice when OAT is above 10
WARNING: Holdover times are guidelines only
cautions: CAUTION: Engine anti-ice must be turned on
CAUTION: The check must be completed within 5 minutes
